reference: High-affinity guests of Cucurbit[7]uril (logKa ≥ 6.7) typically have a molecular weight of 230±103 g/mol, are neutral (formal charge +0), contain on average 2.4 ring system(s), 1.2 H-bond donor(s), and 1.6 H-bond acceptor(s). Representative guests: bis(Trimethylamminomethyl)ferrocene, N1,N1'-(bicyclo[2.2.2]octane-1,4-diylbis(methylene))bis(N3,N3-dimethylpropane-1,3-diamine), (E)-4-(2-(7-(diethylamino)-2-oxo-2H-chromen-3-yl)vinyl)-1-(3-(trimethylammonio)propyl)pyridin-1-ium bromide, bicyclo[2.2.2]octane-1,4-diyldimethanamine, 1-Adamantylazanium.
